subcodes.first_line: O Ja'far! Dost thou tarry still, after the Spirit hath hastened unto the Dawning-Place of the signs of thy Lord, the Mighty, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا جعفر هل توقفت بعد الذی سرع الروح الی مطلع آیات ربک العزیز العلام هذا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power of the Manifestation of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
